results.title: Women In Crime And Punishment
results.body: in the context of crime, from the victims of criminal acts to the perpetrators themselves. Their involvement in crime and the subsequent punishment they face reveal much about societal norms, gender roles, and the justice system. This article explores the multifaceted nature ofwomen's experiences with crime and punishment, focusing on literature, historical contexts, and contemporary issues.
